    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "plt.figure(figsize=(10,5))\n",
        "\n",
        "df['Page Views'].plot(kind='line', marker='o')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.title('Website Traffic Trend')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Index')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Page Views')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.grid(True)\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 487

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "plt.figure(figsize=(8,5))\n",
        "\n",
        "df['Bounce Rate'].plot(kind='hist', bins=20)\n",
        "\n",

        "plt.xlabel('Bounce Rate')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "plt.figure(figsize=(8,5))\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.scatter(df['Session Duration'], df['Page Views'])\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.title('Session Duration vs Page Views')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Session Duration')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Page Views')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "print(\"\\nKEY INSIGHTS\")\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"1. Website traffic fluctuated across different periods.\")\n",
        "print(\"2. Higher session duration generally resulted in more page views.\")\n",
        "print(\"3. Bounce rate analysis helps identify user engagement trends.\")"
      ],
